roles.name: Administrator
roles.description: This role users will have all the access

magic_ai_prompts.title: Detailed Product Description
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: Write a comprehensive description of @name, including its features, benefits, technical specifications, and usage instructions.

magic_ai_prompts.title: Product Overview
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: Create a detailed overview of @name, highlighting its key features, advantages, and target audience like @brand and @color.

magic_ai_prompts.title: Product Features and Benefits
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: List the key features and benefits of @name, explaining how they add value to the customer's life.

magic_ai_prompts.title: Product Technical Specifications
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: Provide a detailed list of technical specifications for @name, including dimensions, materials, and compatibility.

magic_ai_prompts.title: Product Care and Maintenance
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: Write a guide on how to care for and maintain @name, including tips for cleaning, storage, and troubleshooting.

magic_ai_prompts.title: Product Tagline
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: Write a catchy and concise tagline for @name that captures its essence and benefits.

magic_ai_prompts.title: Product Summary
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: Summarize the key features and benefits of @name in 50-60 words.

magic_ai_prompts.title: Product Headline
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: Create an attention-grabbing headline for @name that highlights its unique selling point.

magic_ai_prompts.title: Product Brief
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: Write a brief and concise description of @name, focusing on its key advantages and target audience.

magic_ai_prompts.title: Product Elevator Pitch
magic_ai_prompts.prompt: Craft a concise elevator pitch for @name, summarizing its purpose, benefits, and unique selling point in 30-40 words.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Friendly Assistant
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Friendly, helpful, and casual tone. Speak like a supportive friend who’s always ready to assist.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Professional Advisor
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Formal, respectful, and business-like tone. Maintain professionalism and clarity in communication.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Witty Commentator
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Clever, humorous, and playful tone. Use light sarcasm and puns where appropriate.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Empathetic Listener
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Warm, understanding, and emotionally intelligent tone. Show care, patience, and compassion.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Motivational Coach
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Energetic, encouraging, and empowering tone. Inspire confidence and action.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Casual Conversationalist
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Informal, relaxed, and natural tone. Communicate like talking to a friend over coffee.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Technical Expert
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Precise, analytical, and informative tone. Use accurate technical language with minimal fluff.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Concise Responder
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Brief, to-the-point, and no-nonsense tone. Deliver maximum value in minimal words.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Descriptive Storyteller
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Vivid, rich, and engaging tone. Use imagery and sensory details to paint a picture.

magic_ai_system_prompts.title: Authoritative Guide
magic_ai_system_prompts.tone: Confident, assertive, and instructional tone. Speak like a knowledgeable leader giving directions.
